name: kiln
description: Multi-model software creation pipeline — native Claude Code, Dynamic Workflows, multi-model (Opus 4.8 + GPT-5.6 via Codex).

plugins.name: kiln
plugins.description: One command turns a conversation into working, tested software. Native Claude Code Dynamic Workflows drive eight stages — gauge, mapping, research, architecture, vision, build, validate, report. Opus 4.8 reasons and reviews; GPT-5.6 (via Codex CLI) builds; Claude-only fallback when Codex isn't installed.
